Name: m07_LensFlareBank
Description: Determines the parameters for lens flares.

Fields.Name: Texture ID
Fields.Description: The texture to use for this lens flare.

Fields.Name: Is Flare
Fields.Description: If ON, this lens flare is treated as a flare. If OFF, then it is a ghost.

Fields.Name: Enable Rotation
Fields.Description: If ON, this lens flare can be rotated.

Fields.Name: Enable Scaling
Fields.Description: If ON, this lens flare can be scaled.

Fields.Name: Placement Distance Rate
Fields.Description: The placement distance rate. 0 is the light source position, 1 is the centre of the screen.

Fields.Name: Texture Scale
Fields.Description: The scale to apply to the lens flare texture.

Fields.Name: Texture: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the RGBA color used with the lens flare texture.

Fields.Name: Texture: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the RGBA color used with the lens flare texture.

Fields.Name: Texture: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the RGBA color used with the lens flare texture.

Fields.Name: Texture: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the RGBA color used with the lens flare texture.
